name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Modification of Explorer Hidden Keys
notes:
This Building Block detects modifications to the hidden files keys in registry.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Modification of Explorer Hidden Keys
SIGMA Description: Detects modifications to the hidden files keys in registry. This technique is abused by several malware families to hide their files from normal users.


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Modification of Explorer Hidden Keys on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

when the event matches ("Target Object" = 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\ShowSuperHidden' OR "Target Object" = 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\Hidden') OR ("Registry Key" = 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\ShowSuperHidden' OR "Registry Key" = 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\Hidden') AQL filter query
when the event matches ("Target Details" = 'DWORD (0x00000000)') OR ("Registry Value Data" = 'DWORD (0x00000000)') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Modification of Explorer Hidden Keys on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

AND when the event matches ("Target Object" = 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\ShowSuperHidden' OR "Target Object" = 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\Hidden') OR ("Registry Key" = 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\ShowSuperHidden' OR "Registry Key" = 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\Hidden') AQL filter query
AND when the event matches ("Target Details" = 'DWORD (0x00000000)') OR ("Registry Value Data" = 'DWORD (0x00000000)') AQL filter query
